sentence: 她微微一笑，点头表示同意。
pinyin: Tā wēiwēi yī xiào, diǎntóu biǎoshì tóngyì.
english: She smiled slightly and nodded in agreement.

meaning: 1. god; 2. spirit; 3. demon; 4. occult or supernatural entities in gen
sentence: 奶奶每年都祭拜神灵，祈求全家平安。
pinyin: Nǎi nai měi nián dōu jì bài shén líng, qí qiú quán jiā píng ān.
english: Grandma worships the spirits every year, praying for the whole family's safety.

sentence: 他把购物袋装满了水果和蔬菜。
pinyin: Tā bǎ gòu wù dài zhuāng mǎn le shuǐ guǒ hé shū cài.
english: He filled the shopping bag with fruits and vegetables.

sentence: 基地入口处有宪兵站岗。
pinyin: Jī dì rù kǒu chù yǒu xiàn bīng zhàn gǎng.
english: Military police are standing guard at the base entrance.

sentence: 她在乡村小学教书已经十年了。
pinyin: Tā zài xiāng cūn xiǎo xué jiāo shū yǐ jīng shí nián le.
english: She has been teaching at a rural elementary school for ten years.

meaning: 1. to be on guard; 2. alert; 3. vigilance; 4. alertness
sentence: 深夜独自走路要保持警觉。
pinyin: Shēn yè dú zì zǒu lù yào bǎo chí jǐng jué.
english: Stay alert when walking alone late at night.

sentence: 全校师生欢庆建校一百周年。
pinyin: Quán xiào shī shēng huān qìng jiàn xiào yī bǎi zhōu nián.
english: All teachers and students celebrated the school's centennial.

sentence: 这位武将以勇猛善战著称。
pinyin: Zhè wèi wǔ jiàng yǐ yǒng měng shàn zhàn zhù chēng.
english: This military general was renowned for his bravery and combat skills.

sentence: 兄弟俩为了谁洗碗而争辩起来。
pinyin: Xiōng dì liǎ wèi le shuí xǐ wǎn ér zhēng biàn qǐ lái.
english: The two brothers started arguing about who should wash the dishes.

sentence: 消费者越来越注重高质量的产品。
pinyin: Xiāo fèi zhě yuè lái yuè zhù zhòng gāo zhì liàng de chǎn pǐn.
english: Consumers are paying more and more attention to high-quality products.

sentence: 这座城市位于北纬四十度附近。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéng shì wèi yú běi wěi sì shí dù fù jìn.
english: This city is located near 40 degrees north latitude.

sentence: 他从小就喜欢各种球类运动。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù xǐ huān gè zhǒng qiú lèi yùn dòng.
english: He has loved all kinds of ball sports since childhood.

sentence: 她很少买奢侈品，更喜欢存钱。
pinyin: Tā hěn shǎo mǎi shē chǐ pǐn, gèng xǐ huān cún qián.
english: She rarely buys luxury goods and prefers to save money.

sentence: 孙中山是近代著名的革命家。
pinyin: Sūn Zhōng Shān shì jìn dài zhù míng de gé mìng jiā.
english: Sun Yat-sen was a famous revolutionary in modern Chinese history.

sentence: 老人在街头要饭，路人纷纷给他食物。
pinyin: Lǎo rén zài jiē tóu yào fàn, lù rén fēn fēn gěi tā shí wù.
english: The old man was begging on the street, and passersby gave him food.

meaning: 1. an official position; 2. a job in the bureaucracy
sentence: 他考中进士后获得了一个官职。
pinyin: Tā kǎo zhòng jìn shì hòu huò dé le yī gè guān zhí.
english: After passing the imperial exam, he obtained an official position.

sentence: 她目前未婚，工作是她的重心。
pinyin: Tā mù qián wèi hūn, gōng zuò shì tā de zhòng xīn.
english: She is currently unmarried and focuses mainly on her career.

sentence: 妈妈手腕上戴着一块翡翠手镯。
pinyin: Mā ma shǒu wàn shàng dài zhe yī kuài fěi cuì shǒu zhuó.
english: Mom wears a jadeite bracelet on her wrist.

meaning: 1. merchandise or commodities available immediately after sale; 2. mer
sentence: 这款手机有现货，今天下单明天到。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒu jī yǒu xiàn huò, jīn tiān xià dān míng tiān dào.
english: This phone model is in stock — order today and it arrives tomorrow.

meaning: 1. lit. to hang upside down; 2. fig. topsy-turvy and inequitable, e.g.
sentence: 那栋楼的空调外机倒挂在墙上。
pinyin: Nà dòng lóu de kōng tiáo wài jī dào guà zài qiáng shàng.
english: The outdoor AC unit of that building is mounted upside down on the wall.

meaning: 1. to inhabit a region (esp. ethnic group); 2. to congregate
sentence: 许多少数民族聚居在这个地区。
pinyin: Xǔduō shǎoshù mínzú jùjū zài zhège dìqū.
english: Many ethnic minority groups live together in this region.

sentence: 今年旅游行业十分景气，游客很多。
pinyin: Jīn nián lǚ yóu háng yè shí fēn jǐng qì, yóu kè hěn duō.
english: The tourism industry is booming this year, with many visitors.

meaning: 1. to poison (harm with a toxic substance); 2. to poison (people'
sentence: 过度使用农药会毒害土壤和水源。
pinyin: Guò dù shǐ yòng nóng yào huì dú hài tǔ rǎng hé shuǐ yuán.
english: Overuse of pesticides can poison the soil and water sources.

meaning: 1. to lecture; 2. to teach (a college course)
sentence: 教授每周讲授两节中国历史课。
pinyin: Jiào shòu měi zhōu jiǎng shòu liǎng jié Zhōng guó lì shǐ kè.
english: The professor teaches two sessions of Chinese history class each week.

sentence: 广州属于亚热带气候，冬天不太冷。
pinyin: Guǎng zhōu shǔ yú yà rè dài qì hòu, dōng tiān bù tài lěng.
english: Guangzhou has a subtropical climate and winters are not very cold.

sentence: 国庆节那天，广场上举行了盛大的阅兵仪式。
pinyin: Guó qìng jié nà tiān, guǎng chǎng shàng jǔ xíng le shèng dà de yuè bīng yí shì.
english: On National Day, a grand military parade was held at the square.

sentence: 公司公关部门发出了一份新闻稿。
pinyin: Gōng sī gōng guān bù mén fā chū le yī fèn xīn wén gǎo.
english: The company's PR department issued a press release.

meaning: 1. specialized school; 2. college for professional training; 3. polyte
sentence: 他毕业于一所护理专科学校。
pinyin: Tā bì yè yú yī suǒ hù lǐ zhuān kē xué xiào.
english: He graduated from a nursing polytechnic college.

sentence: 大一新生都要修一门逻辑学基础课。
pinyin: Dà yī xīn shēng dōu yào xiū yī mén luó jí xué jī chǔ kè.
english: All first-year university students must take an introductory logic course.

sentence: 他参加了公司历次重要的谈判。
pinyin: Tā cān jiā le gōng sī lì cì zhòng yào de tán pàn.
english: He participated in every major negotiation the company has held.

sentence: 这篇文章刊载于本月的学术杂志上。
pinyin: Zhè piān wén zhāng kān zǎi yú běn yuè de xué shù zá zhì shàng.
english: This article was published in this month's academic journal.

sentence: 他们学校的手球队刚赢得了市冠军。
pinyin: Tā men xué xiào de shǒu qiú duì gāng yíng dé le shì guàn jūn.
english: Their school's handball team just won the city championship.

sentence: 火箭在发射台上矗立了三天才升空。
pinyin: Huǒjiàn zài fāshè tái shàng chùlìle sān tiān cái shēngkōng.
english: The rocket stood on the launchpad for three days before finally lifting off.

sentence: 今天股市利多消息不断，指数大幅上涨。
pinyin: Jīntiān gǔshì lì duō xiāoxi bùduàn, zhǐshù dàfú shàngzhǎng.
english: There was a stream of bullish news for the stock market today, and the index rose significantly.

meaning: entire year; throughout the year; age at death
sentence: 那位老教授上周去世，终年八十二岁。
pinyin: Nà wèi lǎo jiàoshòu shàng zhōu qùshì, zhōngnián bāshí'èr suì.
english: The elderly professor passed away last week at the age of eighty-two.

sentence: 这个地区历史上出现过几个有名的大族。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū lìshǐ shàng chūxiàngguò jǐ gè yǒumíng de dàzú.
english: Historically, this region was home to several well-known prominent clans.

sentence: 电梯升降速度很快，几秒就到顶层了。
pinyin: Diàntī shēngjiàng sùdù hěn kuài, jǐ miǎo jiù dào dǐng céng le.
english: The elevator rises and descends very quickly — it reaches the top floor in just a few seconds.

sentence: 这个省的风电装机容量在全国名列前茅。
pinyin: Zhège shěng de fēngdiàn zhuāngjī róngliàng zài quánguó míngliè qiánmáo.
english: This province ranks among the top in the country for installed wind power capacity.

sentence: 她在师范学院学习，以后想当小学老师。
pinyin: Tā zài shīfàn xuéyuàn xuéxí, yǐhòu xiǎng dāng xiǎoxué lǎoshī.
english: She is studying at a teachers' college and hopes to become a primary school teacher.

meaning: to fit in; to get on well with others; sociable; to form a mutually su
sentence: 他性格内向，在新环境里不太合群。
pinyin: Tā xìnggé nèixiàng, zài xīn huánjìng lǐ bù tài hé qún.
english: He is introverted and doesn't fit in easily in a new environment.

sentence: 列车长的座车挂在列车最后一节。
pinyin: Lièchē zhǎng de zuòchē guà zài lièchē zuìhòu yī jié.
english: The train conductor's carriage is attached at the very end of the train.

sentence: 跨境网购越来越方便，两天就能收到货。
pinyin: Kuàjìng wǎnggòu yuèlái yuè fāngbiàn, liǎng tiān jiù néng shōudào huò.
english: Cross-border online shopping is getting more and more convenient — orders arrive in just two days.

meaning: (of the parts of a machine) to move together; to act in coordination;
sentence: 两家公司决定联动，共同推出这款新产品。
pinyin: Liǎng jiā gōngsī juédìng liándòng, gòngtóng tuīchū zhè kuǎn xīn chǎnpǐn.
english: The two companies decided to collaborate and jointly launch this new product.

sentence: 机房里装了几台风机，保证设备散热。
pinyin: Jīfáng lǐ zhuāngle jǐ tái fēngjī, bǎozhèng shèbèi sànrè.
english: Several ventilators were installed in the server room to keep the equipment cool.

sentence: 这位立法委员提案要修改劳工法。
pinyin: Zhè wèi lìfǎ wěiyuán tí'àn yào xiūgǎi láogōng fǎ.
english: This legislative council member has proposed amendments to labor law.

sentence: 他是球队里最厉害的球手，得分最高。
pinyin: Tā shì qiúduì lǐ zuì lìhài de qiúshǒu, défēn zuìgāo.
english: He is the best player on the team with the highest score.

sentence: 抗氧化剂能帮助身体清除多余的自由基。
pinyin: Kàng yǎnghuà jì néng bāngzhù shēntǐ qīngchú duōyú de zìyóujī.
english: Antioxidants can help the body eliminate excess free radicals.

sentence: 新闻自由是民主社会的重要基础之一。
pinyin: Xīnwén zìyóu shì mínzhǔ shèhuì de zhòngyào jīchǔ zhī yī.
english: Freedom of the press is one of the important foundations of a democratic society.

sentence: 他在当地一家报馆工作，负责采访新闻。
pinyin: Tā zài dāngdì yījiā bàoguǎn gōngzuò, fùzé cǎifǎng xīnwén.
english: He works at a local newspaper office, responsible for reporting the news.

meaning: 1. bronze medal; 2. bronze plaque bearing a business name or logo etc;
sentence: 她在这次比赛中赢得了铜牌。
pinyin: Tā zài zhè cì bǐsài zhōng yíngdé le tóngpái.
english: She won a bronze medal in this competition.
